column1: P1: ACTION/PROPS="Handing out a steaming cup of tea calmly" | TEXT="まずは一服いかがですか" P2: ACTION/PROPS="Closing her eyes and breathing deeply" | TEXT="落ち着いてくださいな" P3: ACTION/PROPS="Placing a hand on someone's arm to stop them" | TEXT="一旦、お座りなさい" P4: ACTION/PROPS="Speaking with a calm, melodic voice" | TEXT="慌てる必要はございません" P5: ACTION/PROPS="Preparing an ink stone slowly and rhythmically" | TEXT="心静かに致しましょう" P6: ACTION/PROPS="Pointing to a calm, still pond or lake" | TEXT="水面のような心で" P7: ACTION/PROPS="Adjusting a flower in a vase carefully" | TEXT="深呼吸を一つ" P8: ACTION/PROPS="Looking steady and unshakeable in a crisis" | TEXT="私がついておりますわ" P9: ACTION/PROPS="Stroking a cat with a peaceful expression" | TEXT="静寂を楽しみましょう"
